hook.content: Peter starts catch-side-pass-1 under the cover-story frame; the model holds cleanly; the soft yellow warning flag in the corner of his left display clears, and he does not notice it go. End-of-quarter deliverables (launch trajectory phase, then interceptor approach geometry) and a deferred 'third thing' pull him forward — under dramatic irony, since the orbital interceptors do not exist.
